messages.content: ANIMUS capability note: skill tools are available in this chat session. Reuse existing skills with skills_list/skill_view when relevant, and when a workflow repeats across requests, create or update a reusable skill with skill_manage.
Give me a concise status summary and immediate next steps.

_capture_meta.note: This capture reflects the ANIMUS request payload sent to Hermes. It does not include Hermes internal prompt compiler expansions.
